---
format:
  html: {toc: true, toc-depth: 4, theme: cosmo}
toc: true
toc-depth: 4
number-sections: true
theme: quarto

---
<style></style><style>.printedClojure .sourceCode {
  background-color: transparent;
  border-style: none;
}
</style><style>.clay-limit-image-width .clay-image {max-width: 100%}
.clay-side-by-side .sourceCode {margin: 0}
.clay-side-by-side {margin: 1em 0}
</style>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.0.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script><script src="https://code.jquery.com/ui/1.13.1/jquery-ui.min.js" type="text/javascript"></script>

::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(rand)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
0.40513618553948627

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(rand-int 10)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
0

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(take 10 (repeatedly #(rand-int 10)))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(1 7 4 9 7 4 5 8 3 1)

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(mod 10 3)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
1

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn random-number [min max]
  (+ (rand-int (- (inc max) min)) min))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-number 32 42)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
34

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-number 32 42)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
34

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(take 5 (repeatedly #(random-number 32 42)))
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(38 38 41 36 41)

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn random-number
  ([min max]
   (+ (rand-int (- (inc max) min)) min))
  ([max]
   (random-number 0 max))
  ([]
   (random-number 0 1)))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-number 10)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
0

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-number)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
0

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-number 10 20)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
19

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn random-numbers [n min max]
  (take n (repeatedly #(random-number min max))))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-numbers 10 32 42)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(32 41 39 40 38 34 34 32 42 41)

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(defn random-numbers
  ([n min max]
   (take n (repeatedly #(random-number min max))))
  ([n max]
   (random-numbers n 0 max))
  ([n]
   (random-numbers n 0 1)))
```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-numbers 10)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(0 1 0 1 0 1 0 0 0 1)

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-numbers 10 42)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(31 21 42 12 12 9 3 23 26 18)

```
:::



::: {.sourceClojure}
```clojure
(random-numbers 10 32 42)
```
:::



::: {.printedClojure}
```clojure
(35 39 41 35 34 39 37 33 42 37)

```
:::



```{=html}
<div style="background-color:grey;height:2px;width:100%;"></div>
```



```{=html}
<div><pre><small><small>source: <a href="https://github.com/scicloj/stats_with_clojure/blob/main/notebooks/random_number_generator.clj">notebooks/random_number_generator.clj</a></small></small></pre></div>
```
